options.content:
| Component | Current Design Value | Immediate Effect |
|---|---:|---|
| MS-SOFC | ${msSofcCapacityKw} kW | base-load continuity |
| SSB | ${ssbWeightKg} kg | vehicle weight / payload |
| LH2 Tank | ${lh2VolumeL} L | range / packaging |
| IWM | ${iwmWeightKg} kg | drivetrain packaging |
| Swap Body | ${swapCycleMin} min | turnaround continuity |

```text
SSB Weight ${ssbWeightKg} kg
→ Vehicle Weight ↑
→ Payload ↓
→ Capacity Utilization ↓
→ Trips ↓
```

```text
LH2 Volume ${lh2VolumeL} L
→ Packaging Thickness ↑
→ Floor Height ↑
→ Accessibility ↓
→ Conversion ↓
```

```text
MS-SOFC Capacity ${msSofcCapacityKw} kW
→ Refill Frequency ↓
→ Fleet Uptime ↑
→ Dispatch Availability ↑
```

```text
Swap Cycle ${swapCycleMin} min
→ Node Queue ↓
→ Fleet Idle ↓
→ Utilization ↑
```

```text
Component Change
→ Vehicle KPI
→ Fleet KPI
→ Node KPI
→ Dispatch Success
→ Trips/day
→ Contribution
→ Federation State
```

| Federation KPI | Current Impact Direction |
|---|---|
| Fleet Availability | improving |
| Queue Stability | improving |
| Dispatch Success | improving |
| Trips/day | improving |
| Contribution | improving |
| Federation State | AUTHORIZED |
